result:
Review written to `docs/implementation/let-s-get-back-to-curried-spring/results/review.json`.

**Summary**: 8 findings, all **non-blocking**. No real bugs, security issues, or plan violations that change behavior — the implementation closely matches the plan, tests cover the right edge cases, auth correctness checks out, and date math is uniformly UTC.

The notable items:
- `/api/health` is now auth-required (regression vs `main`; README still claims no-auth)
- `HabitCompletion.section`/`sectionOrder` typed non-null but the API can return `null` for sectionless habits
- `INTERNAL_BASE_URL` defaults to `localhost:3000`, undocumented in `.env.example`, will break Vercel deploy
- `role="grid"` without `role="row"`/`role="gridcell"` children — incomplete ARIA pattern
- Completed cells lack a screen-reader status (only skipped cells have one)
- Smoke-test artifacts piggybacked into the PR via the housekeeping commit
- Logout endpoint has no UI surface
- One `key` style nit
